items.name_en: 。🌷《With full original red box packaging》🌷【New】 Gucci Blondie series new handbag featuring the brand's classic logo first seen in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style, perfectly interpreting the brand's classic design and modern essence. This small shoulder bag is crafted from black patent leather, featuring enamel brand circular logo, and comes with a gold-tone chain shoulder strap.
items.name_cn:
。🌷《With full original red box packaging》🌷【New】 Gucci Blondie series new handbag featuring the brand's classic logo first seen in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style, perfectly interpreting the brand's classic design and modern essence. This small shoulder bag is crafted from black patent leather, featuring enamel brand circular logo, and comes with a gold-tone chain shoulder strap.
Black patent leather
Black patent leather trim
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Enamel circular interlocking GG
Inside: 1 zip pocket
Outside: 1 back open pocket
Removable chain shoulder strap (51cm long)
Magnetic snap closure
Model: 814952.
Size: 29.5cm (W) x 12.5cm (H) x 7cm (D)
Weight: approx. 900g
Color: Black patent leather/Original leather.
Fits iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, long wallet, and lipstick
Made in Italy

Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, AirPods headphones, card holder and lipstick

Color: Silver full leather/Original leather.

items.name_en: 🔥🔥🔥【Original leather with 🌈 full counter packaging】🔥🔥Intro: The Jackie 1961 series, inspired by 'Aria - Fashion Aria', is re-launched with a soft-textured, structured rectangular tote bag. The series features the iconic gold-tone push-lock hardware. Sparkling crystal rhinestones!!️ paired with noble lizard skin🦎 are a perfect match! The hollow-out design adds even more fashion sense~Material!!️ Uses counter-quality crystal rhinestones and imported lizard skin, matching hardware with precise polishing👏Clear texture, delicate quality, the highest quality!

Dimensions: 19x13x3cm
Color: Crystal rhinestones.

items.name_en: 🌷《With Full Original Green Box Packaging》🌷
items.name_cn:
🌷《With Full Original Green Box Packaging》🌷
Original Leather [New] GG Marmont Quilted Mini Bag. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette and neutral beige quilted V-shaped leather. The bag is slightly structured with a flap closure and double G accessories. It offers versatile carrying styles, easily switching between shoulder and handbag by sliding the metal chain. Beige quilted V-shaped leather, gold-tone accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, double G, chain strap (55cm high) or top handle (30cm high). Also works as a crossbody. Spring buckle flap, Weight: approx. 0.6kg.
Model: 446744.
Size: 22(W)x 13(H)x 6cm(D)
Color: Beige Full Leather/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
Fits: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, small wallet, and lipstick

This GG Marmont small shoulder bag is crafted from quilted V-shaped leather in a refined beige tone, adding a bright new piece to the 2025 Early Spring collection. The item features the series' iconic double G motif, a vintage 1970s symbol that has become a classic element of the brand.
